# Homelab Publishing Template

Copy this file to `src/content/homelab/your-homelab-slug.md` and replace all placeholder values.

Do not publish this template file directly.

---

```yaml
---
title: "Your Homelab Environment Title"
description: "Summary of the lab purpose, stack, and engineering goals."
slug: your-homelab-slug
category: Detection Engineering Lab
platform: Proxmox
difficulty: intermediate
featured: false
technologies:
  - ELK Stack
  - Docker
  - Terraform
tags:
  - homelab
  - detection-engineering
updatedDate: 2026-01-15
coverImage: /images/your-homelab-cover.png
---
```

## Overview

Describe the lab objective, constraints, and intended use cases.

## Architecture

Document hosts, networking, storage, and service layout.

## Build Steps

Walk through provisioning, configuration, and validation.

## Operational Notes

Capture maintenance tasks, backups, monitoring, and troubleshooting tips.

## Future Work

List planned improvements, experiments, and integration goals.
